Package de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class NewSMTTranslationSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.NewSMTTranslationSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class NewSMTTranslationSettings extends AbstractSettings
A collection of settings for the new (= 2021) SMT translation. Unlike the other settings, these settings do not have a fixed set of keys but are driven by arbitrary keys. Hence, all that this class here does, is to essentially delegate methods to the underlying hash map. The list of available settings can be retrieved from SMTHandlerServices.getSMTProperties().

      public void writeSettings(Properties props)

      The settings to store are written to the given Properties object.

    • getMap

      public Map<String,String> getMap()
      Retreive an immutable view onto the underlying hash map
      Returns:
      a non-null immutable hashmap.

    • get

      public String get(String key)
      Retrieve a single value from the underlying hashmap
      Parameters:
      key - the key to look up
      Returns:
      the value for the key, null if not present

    • put

      public String put(String key, String value)
      Set a key-value-pair. All listeners are informed after the internal hashmap has been updated.
      Parameters:
      key - the non-null key to set
      value - the non-null value to set
      Returns:
      the value that was in the map prior to the call (see Map.put(Object, Object).
